sections_cited: section 34A of the Federal Excise Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Federal Excise Reference Application No. 47, 45 & 46 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 03.10.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for the applicant On the last date following order was passed: Per learned counsel, the controversy is squarely covered by Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Freight Forwarders Association vs. Province of Sindh reported as 2017 PTD 01. In such circumstances, he states that the questions of law do not arise. He further states that Special FERA 45 and 46 of 2021 are connected cases and the same may also be taken up alongwith this matter. Let all three matters be listed on 03.10.2025. In view of the aforesaid learned counsel for the applicant does not press these reference applications which are dismissed as withdrawn. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 34A of the Federal Excise Act, 2005. Judge Judge Amjad
